Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order

PROBATE ACCOUNTING STATUS PETITION
Off Calendar Jan-02-2013 Continued To Feb-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: June Lee for and with Laura Matsui and for Tracy Wong.

The Court stated that the Estate should have been closed a long time ago and that it cannot wait until the divorce is final. Ms. Lee requested a continuance stating that they are considering doing a buyout between the siblings. The status report was continued to February 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of a petition for final distribution.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Cabrera.
